steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks how the UK's decline compares to other nations. The table provides percent change values, which allow fair comparison across countries with different baseline hours.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "though the percent decrease in hours worked in the United Kingdom was greater than that in Germany and Mexico, it was less than that in Australia.": reverses one or more comparisons relative to the table data. ✗
  • "though the percent decrease in hours worked in the United Kingdom was less than that in Germany, it was greater than that in Australia and Mexico.": UK declined 24% — less than Germany (44%) but greater than Australia (21%) and Mexico (7%) — exactly matches the data. ✓
  • "the decline in number of hours worked was greater in the United Kingdom than it was in Germany, Australia, or Mexico.": switches to absolute hours rather than percent change, making the comparison invalid. ✗
  • "while the number of hours worked rose in the United Kingdom from 1950 to 2017, it declined in Germany, Australia, and Mexico.": incorrectly claims UK rose instead of declined. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
